mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device_contacts (device_id, customer_id, contact_id, display_name, first_name, last_name, phone_number, email, company, job_title, department, notes, is_managed, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{customerId}, #{contactId}, #{displayName}, #{firstName}, #{lastName}, #{phoneNumber}, #{email}, #{company}, #{jobTitle}, #{department}, #{notes}, #{isManaged}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, d.number AS device_number FROM device_contacts c JOIN devices d ON c.device_id = d.id WHERE c.device_id = #{deviceId} AND c.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY c.display_name

SELECT c.*, d.number AS device_number FROM device_contacts c JOIN devices d ON c.device_id = d.id WHERE c.customer_id = #{customerId} AND c.device_id = #{deviceId} AND (c.display_name ILIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' OR c.phone_number ILIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' OR c.email ILIKE '%' || #{query} || '%') ORDER BY c.display_name
mapper.update: UPDATE device_contacts SET display_name = #{displayName}, first_name = #{firstName}, last_name = #{lastName}, phone_number = #{phoneNumber}, email = #{email}, company = #{company}, job_title = #{jobTitle}, department = #{department}, notes = #{notes}, is_managed = #{isManaged}, is_synced = #{isSynced}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM device_contacts WHERE id = #{id} AND customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device_contact_phones (contact_id, phone_type, phone_number, is_primary) VALUES (#{contactId}, #{phoneType}, #{phoneNumber}, #{isPrimary})
INSERT INTO device_contact_emails (contact_id, email_type, email, is_primary) VALUES (#{contactId}, #{emailType}, #{email}, #{isPrimary})
